createlazytick.arm.weak_list_shortened: Target blocks in weak lazy tick list, shortened interval

createlazytick.mode.description.forced_s: Description: Ignore machine load, run at fixed frequency.

createlazytick.mode.description.auto_dyn: Description: Calculate sleep duration dynamically based on load, but not exceeding set limit.
createlazytick.mode.description.unknown_: Description: If you see this, there might be a bug.
